subcodes.first_line: O Rustam, scion of Dastan! Thy namesake by the power of his sword became a conqueror of the world, yet that conquest led to captivity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رستم دستان همنام تو بقوه شمشیر جهانگیر گشت ولی آن جهانگیری منتهی باسیری
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
